title: International Weddings - Bridging Cultures with Better Together

intro.paragraph1: Roughly half of all the weddings we DJ as Better Together are international or binational – and we hope that stays true in the future too. We're both fluent in German and English, so nothing gets lost from your very first message to the dance floor. There are personal reasons behind this too: Jonathan lived in the USA and Canada for his studies, and Vera lived in England – so we both bring our own international life experience to the table. Jonathan's DJ career even began exactly where cultures meet: his very first DJ experience came through his work with a mostly international audience — people from all over Europe, North Africa, the USA, Latin America, and Asia.
intro.paragraph2: Our secret? In our in-depth pre-wedding call, we get to know not just you, but your musical worlds too. You send us songs that matter to you – which is especially helpful for cultures we haven't worked with yet – and we do our own research on top of that. Because there's a big difference between "the bride is from Thailand" and knowing that Korean music is hugely popular in Thailand. We experienced exactly that at one wedding: "Gangnam Style" had the crowd going wild – a moment that's only possible with real research. That's how we find songs both cultures know and love, from Punjabi MC to Stromae, while also deliberately creating moments that belong entirely to just one culture. For these moments we'll even pick up the microphone – something we rarely do otherwise – to bring all the guests together for a special moment.
intro.paragraph3: Your guests have traveled halfway around the world for this one day – with familiar sounds from home, we make sure they still feel a little bit at home here in Germany.
intro.paragraph4: No experience yet with your particular cultural combination? Even more exciting! We love learning something new, together with you, and turn every new culture into a special experience for all your guests.

images.photo2Alt: A group of people dancing joyfully

cta.convinced: Convinced? Write to us, no strings attached – whether in German or English

seo.title: International Weddings - DJ for Binational Couples | Better Together
seo.description: German-Moroccan, German-Venezuelan, or multilingual? Better Together brings your cultures together on the dance floor - as a DJ duo for international weddings in Berlin and Brandenburg.
seo.ogTitle: International Weddings with Better Together DJ
seo.ogDescription: We bridge cultures on the dance floor - DJ duo for international and binational weddings in Berlin and Brandenburg.
